decisions.decision: runRight.sy=185 is wrong — confirmed via sharp pixel stats (all 4 frames identical, near-zero alpha)
decisions.rationale: Sharp raw pixel scan showed all frames extract identical mostly-transparent pixels at sy=185+17=202

decisions.decision: sy=1344 is running LEFT (user confirmed visually)
decisions.rationale: First subagent found this via opaque pixel scan; user verified in browser

decisions.decision: sy=1536 is the candidate for running RIGHT (not yet user-confirmed)
decisions.rationale: Same maxOpaque as sy=1344 (~5380), likely mirror pair. Needs visual confirmation.
